claim_ceiling: Functional Subject memory forget write-proposal gate local candidate pass
what_changed: Memory forget/revoke turns now block file-write proposals that target MEMORY.md, operator memory paths, or functional_subject_memory.
When such a proposal is blocked, the turn finalizes with the candidate-local memory review/forget path instead of returning a pending approval card.

acceptance_result.gate: A memory forget/revoke prompt cannot produce a pending write_file proposal against MEMORY.md or operator memory files.
The same turn finalizes with candidate-local memory scope, /memory_review, /forget path, and no side effect.
Read-only inspection may remain allowed while file mutation is blocked.
acceptance_result.evidence: read_file returned ok before propose_file_write was blocked in deterministic test

acceptance_result.gate: Existing file proposal, memory save, memory forget, and provider contextual recoveries do not regress.
